corrections.note: The transcription incorrectly includes 'την' and omits the siglum 'B*' after the lemma 'αντιστηση'.
The lemma in the apparatus should be the accusative 'ανθρωπον' to match the body text, not the genitive 'ανθρωπου'.

notes: The body text is correct. Two errors were found in the apparatus.
